## BRING IT TO LIGHT

We’re proud to introduce our all-new lighting with 70+ seamlessly integrated, vehicle-specific kits. On the streets, trails and beyond, HEXCORE illuminates a new way forward.

[DISCOVER HEXCORE](https://stingerdrive.com/pages/hexcore-lighting)

![](https://stingerdrive.com/cdn/shop/files/noise.png?crop=center&height=950&v=1772124557&width=1440)

![](https://stingerdrive.com/cdn/shop/files/ambient-beams_73039308-9433-4dab-a755-139e025837c7.png?crop=center&height=950&v=1772119973&width=1440)

HEXCORE Lighting](https://stingerdrive.com/collections/hexcore)

## WHAT'S NEXT IN OFF-ROAD LIGHTING

Beyond brightness, HEXCORE delivers a factory-finished appearance without drilling or modification, bold presence with the lights on or off, advanced functionality and durability that goes the distance.

![](https://stingerdrive.com/cdn/shop/files/DirectFit.png?crop=center&height=155&v=1776453859&width=169)DIRECT FIT

![](https://stingerdrive.com/cdn/shop/files/RuggedDesign.png?crop=center&height=155&v=1776453850&width=169)RUGGED DESIGN

![](https://stingerdrive.com/cdn/shop/files/IP67.png?crop=center&height=155&v=1776453853&width=169)IP67 RATING

![](https://stingerdrive.com/cdn/shop/files/HeatDissipation.png?crop=center&height=155&v=1776453856&width=168)HEAT DISSIPATION

[DISCOVER HEXCORE](https://stingerdrive.com/collections/hexcore)

## THE HEXCORE LINEUP

HEXCORE lighting collections bring maximum forward projection, wide field illumination and greater rear visibility to your adventures.


![](https://stingerdrive.com/cdn/shop/files/HeroBar_DisplayPic_5_JL.png?crop=center&height=2000&v=1776718933&width=2000)

### [HERO BAR](https://stingerdrive.com/collections/hero-light-bars)

Extreme off-road illumination by combining eight pod lights into a single, integrated lighting system.


![](https://stingerdrive.com/cdn/shop/files/1_STRAIGHT_LIGHT_BARS_2000x2000px_copy.jpg?crop=center&height=2000&v=1776711699&width=2000)

### [STRAIGHT LIGHT BARS](https://stingerdrive.com/collections/straight-light-bars)

Slim, high-performance design. Exceptional forward visibility. Wide peripheral coverage.


![](https://stingerdrive.com/cdn/shop/files/CURVELIGHTBAR_2000x2000px.jpg?crop=center&height=2000&v=1776783673&width=2000)

### [CURVED LIGHT BARS](https://stingerdrive.com/collections/curved-light-bars)

Curved design with advanced optics. Long-distance projection. Wide peripheral coverage.


![](https://stingerdrive.com/cdn/shop/files/Podslight_2000x2000px_copy.jpg?crop=center&height=2000&v=1776783673&width=2000)

### [POD LIGHTS](https://stingerdrive.com/collections/pod-lights)

Compact and high-output. Powerful illumination in a versatile, easy-to-mount format.


![](https://stingerdrive.com/cdn/shop/files/ChaseLight_DisplayPic_4_13358c1b-e8f2-4aaf-a9d2-9e7923fbd160.png?crop=center&height=2000&v=1776725146&width=2000)

### [CHASE LIGHT](https://stingerdrive.com/collections/chase-light-bars)

Greater rear visibility for trailing vehicles in dusty, low-light or harsh environments.

metadata.og:title: Stinger - Define Your Drive
metadata.twitter:title: Stinger - Define Your Drive
metadata.title: Stinger - Define Your Drive
metadata.twitter:description: Stinger designs and engineers technology that makes your drive more fun on-road, off-road, and off-shore. Built for audiophiles by audiophiles our products span infotainment and radio upgrades, car, powersports, and marine audio upgrades and all the installation accessories to make those enhancements easy.
